title: VIED Self Stirring Coffee Mug Rechargeable Automatic Magnetic Stirring Coffee Mug (Pink)
description:
About this item
Powerful Cooling ---- The magnetic coffee stirrer mug provides a rapid cooling function, which uses advanced cooling technology to quickly reduce the drink from 85°C to 55°C, ensuring a better taste of the drink
Stirring Function ---- The one-touch automatic stirring design easily mixes beverages in less than 30 seconds with the built-in magnetic stirring mechanism
Auto Stirring Coffee Mug ---- Automatic magnetic stirring coffee mug, perfect for busy professionals, students, and coffee enthusiasts who want to enjoy their beverages anywhere, anytime
USB Charging Convenience ---- Automatic Stirring Coffee Mug comes with a powerful rechargeable battery that can be quickly fully charged, one charge can be used multiple times
ABS and 304 Stainless Steel ---- Crafted from high-quality ABS and stainless steel, this sturdy and reliable stirring mug ensures a consistent mixing experience whether you're at home, in the office, or on the go
